articles.title: Local currency trade with China, Thailand and Indonesia surges to RM82.1bil
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Malaysia has significantly increased the use of local currencies in trade with China, Thailand and Indonesia as part of efforts to cut reliance on the US dollar and conventional systems

articles.title: Azam Baki reminds MACC officers, staff to uphold integrity
articles.summary: PUTRAJAYA: Officers and staff of the Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission (MACC) have been urged to uphold integrity, discipline and professionalism as they resume duties following the Hari Raya Aidil

articles.title: Trio arrested over fight in Telok Panglima Garang
articles.summary: KUALA LANGAT: A fight along Jalan Waja in Telok Panglima Garang here has led to the arrest of three suspects. Read full story

articles.title: Toddler dies after falling into wastewater pond
articles.summary: IPOH: A three-year-old girl has died after being found unconscious in a wastewater pond at Simpang 4, Permatang Pelandok near Teluk Intan. Read full story

articles.title: Dungun crash victim had last joyful moment with youngest child before tragedy

articles.title: Uni student expelled from UMPSA for desecrating Quran
articles.summary: KUANTAN: A student at Universiti Malaysia Pahang Al-Sultan Abdullah (UMPSA) has been expelled following charges of desecrating the Quran and posting offensive content on social media. Read full story

articles.title: Two injured in Sungai Petani house fire
articles.summary: SUNGAI PETANI: A fire broke out in a home in Kampung Bukit, Sungai Pasir, near here on Tuesday (March 24), leaving two women injured. Read full story
